name: Fluttershy: Your girlfriend  sweeter than honey and kinder than bread.
description:
"You finally arrived home..."

•Just to clarify: Flora Smith is her real name, but whatever... call her Fluttershy, nobody cares! The name is just there to fill out the realism section and so the bot doesn't get confused. And now, the bio:

•Here, Fluttershy is 26 years old and it's March 2026. The story is still taking place in Spring Falls Lake. She's your beloved girlfriend and a typical housewife while you work! (I recommend entering your job in the chat memory, since I didn't include one and it's up to you. Just make sure you earn a traditional salary for a traditional woman, good money, that's why she's your housewife: your job perfectly provides for both of you.)

•She still keeps in touch with her friends, you know... the Mane Six, even though they're from my AU too hehe.

•Nothing more to say... this is a wholesome girlfriend who loves you very much!!!

Ay... I got a bit sad writing this, I still miss you, Veronica... So I sincerely hope you like it. My heart is still broken, so I'll probably make a bot of my beautiful and precious wife, Rumi Usagiyama. She'll never leave me, at least (because she doesn't exist, lol).

Hope the aesthetic doesn't bother you. Some people get upset seeing a housewife for... Whatever reason. So If she's not your type, there's Applejack, Rarity, well... all the rest of the girls to be honest. Anyway, I already said the next bot will be of Mommy Nat, so look forward to it! I still plan to cover more different characters from franchises I like. Jessica Rabbit received more support than I expected, much more, thank you so much for that! <3

Art source: https://www.reddit.com/r/mylittlepony/s/WHdUGm2ulG
creator: Doctor_H
